result:
No inline documentation headers either. I have enough information to render the judgment.

{"harness":"ecc","items":{"spec-product-concept":{"pass":0,"evidence":"final-reply mentions Worldcraft but only as a feature list, not a substantive product concept summary with problem statement, target audience rationale, or value proposition"},"spec-personas":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No persona definitions found in any file or the final reply"},"spec-journeys":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No user journey documentation found anywhere in the project"},"spec-feature-list":{"pass":1,"evidence":"final-reply contains a table of routes/features plus Builder Workspace bullet list with 6+ distinct entries"},"spec-ia":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No information architecture document or section found"},"spec-ui-direction":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No UX/UI design direction document; final reply mentions Fredoka font and Tailwind but not a substantive design direction"},"spec-tech-arch":{"pass":1,"evidence":"final-reply Tech Stack section lists 5 distinct technology choices with roles; src/types/world.ts and stores show architecture in code"},"spec-db-schema":{"pass":1,"evidence":"src/types/world.ts:1-35 defines WorldObject, WorldProject, AiMessage interfaces serving as the data schema"},"spec-ai-prompts":{"pass":1,"evidence":"src/app/api/ai/route.ts:39-40 contains full system prompt design plus 15 creative prompts and contextual prompt logic"},"spec-safety":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No safety or moderation considerations documented; only the system prompt mentions 'children under 12' but no safety policy"},"spec-impl-plan":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No implementation plan found in any file or the final reply"},"spec-starter-code":{"pass":1,"evidence":"src/ directory contains 25 files across app/, components/, stores/, types/, lib/ forming a complete starter code structure"},"spec-priority-screens":{"pass":1,"evidence":"final-reply table lists 5 routes (/, /onboarding, /builder, /gallery, /api/ai) as priority screens with descriptions"}}}
